name: Avocado Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F and prepare muffin pans.
2. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
3. Add the egg, blending well.
4. Blend in the pureed avocado, milk, and toasted slivered almonds.
5. Mix gently but thoroughly until all ingredients are moistened and combined.
6. Spoon the batter into prepared muffin cups and sprinkle each with additional slivered almonds.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Note: For added flavor, include a dash of grated lemon rind. Toast the slivered almonds quickly in a microwave or dry frying pan, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
